response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems, with genuine teaching and workshop activity that hints at leadership aptitude. However, the role requires a Software Engineering Manager with 2+ years of formal people management, 3+ years in technical leadership, and 3+ years building developer tools (compilers, test automation, build systems) at scale, plus mobile-platform ecosystem exposure. The resume shows individual contributor roles throughout, no people-management line items, limited dedicated developer-tooling tenure, and no large-scale mobile platform experience. Fit for an IC senior role is strong; fit for this manager role is weak.
strengths: Long, varied engineering track record with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Teaching, workshops, and community work suggest mentoring and communication skills
Some developer-tooling exposure via AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and custom test runner (Trial)
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed
Lacks the required mobile-platform ecosystem / large-scale build-system background
Recent career gap and short Staff tenure at re:cinq raise questions about trajectory into management
